text.title: AI Research Tools Selection Map Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Team uses Perplexity for a scientific claim and ships a wrong therapy recommendation.
antipattern.root-cause: Tool chosen by familiarity, not evidence-type.
antipattern.fix: Map evidence_type → tool BEFORE running queries.

antipattern.symptom: Market sizing slide reports 2022 numbers as 2026.
Final report has paragraphs without citation; audit fails.
antipattern.root-cause: AI-generated summary not checked for citation completeness.
antipattern.fix: Reject any claim without URL/DOI; loop back to tool.
